{{Quote|The time has come for a face-to-face meeting. Come to star coordinates 2839.23 893.84 in one week's time and we will settle this.|The Claw, in a message to a group of smugglers|<ref name="Claw" />}}
'''Yaronn''' was a [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] [[Waterworld/Legends|waterworld]] whose only significant landmass was a 200–square kilometer–large, [[Forest/Legends|forest]]-covered continent. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[The Claw (bounty hunter)|the Claw]], a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] carrying a grudge against a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]], sent a message inviting them to Yaronn. There, the Claw prepared to [[Hunting/Legends|hunt]] on the group, offering to cease hostilities against the smugglers if they evaded capture.

==Description==
Yaronn was an unexplored [[Waterworld/Legends|waterworld]]<ref name="Claw" /> located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space's]] [[Yaronn system/Legends|Yaronn system]],<ref name="TEA" /> at [[Star/Legends|star]] coordinates 2839.23 893.84. Mostly covered by an [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]], the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had only one major continent, a small landmass with an area of approximately 200 square kilometers. The terrain of the continent was dominated by dense [[Forest/Legends|forest]], and its fauna was negligible.<ref name="Claw" />

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] known as [[The Claw (bounty hunter)|the Claw]] began terrorizing a group of [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] he held accountable for the [[Death/Legends|death]] of his [[The Claw's brother|brother]], a mid-level [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]]. Eventually, the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] sent the group a message inviting the smugglers to a face-to-face meeting in order to finally resolve their differences. The message contained Yaronn's coordinates and instructed the group to travel there within a [[Standard week/Legends|week]].<ref name="Claw" />

The smugglers were the first to arrive on Yaronn's sole continent, followed shortly by the Claw, who proposed a contest between the two parties. After an [[Standard hour/Legends|hour]]-long head start, the Claw and his [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetically]] [[Cyborg/Legends|enhanced]] tracking beasts would begin hunting down the smugglers. The bounty hunter further offered to cease all hostilities toward the group if it managed to either evade the pursuers for an entire [[Standard day/Legends|night]] or defeat the Claw himself.<ref name="Claw" />

==Behind the scenes==
Yaronn was created by [[Bill Olmesdahl]] as a setting for "[[Under The Claw]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure hook published in the [[1992]] supplement ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen]]'' for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Claw" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Yaronn [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square T-5.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
